reviews.comment:
El lugar es muy lindo, parquizado, baños limpios y con jabón y papel higiénico; el shop con aire acondicionado, wifi, mesas para comer, con las medidas sanitarias requeridas Anti covid, bastante completo en cuanto  comidas, bebidas y snacks, lo único que los que lo atienden no tienen buena predisposición, mala cara y pocas ganas de atender...

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice, with landscaping, clean bathrooms with soap and toilet paper; the shop has air conditioning, Wi-Fi, tables for eating, and the required anti-Covid sanitary measures are in place. It's quite complete in terms of food, drinks, and snacks. The only problem is that the staff are unhelpful, have a sour face, and seem unwilling to serve customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dW9mZWZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena relación precio /alojamiento. Para mi gusto las habitaciones son muy pequeñas pero tiene todo lo que tiene que tener un lugar de paso. La atención súper buena! 🤗

(Translated by Google)
Good value for money. The rooms are a bit small for my taste, but it has everything you need for a short stay. The service was excellent! 🤗

reviews.comment:
Los playeros son bastante mal humorados y el parabrisas lo tuve que limpiar yo...( Ni siquiera preguntaron)...

(Translated by Google)
The beachgoers were quite grumpy and I had to clean the windshield myself... (They didn't even ask)...

reviews.comment:
No tiene sombra para estacionar,  ni lugar donde descansar un rato Además mucha demora para cargar combustible cerca de más de una hora por descarga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
There's no shade for parking, nor a place to rest for a while. Plus, there are long waits to refuel, often more than an hour per fuel delivery.
